archimate:ApplicationService.name: Multimedia distribution
archimate:ApplicationService.documentation:
Definition: Multimedia Distribution refers to a data management application service that facilitates the efficient and scalable distribution of multimedia content, such as audio, video, images, and other multimedia formats. It encompasses the storage, retrieval, and delivery of multimedia assets to end-users or target systems. This service typically involves the use of network infrastructure, content delivery networks (CDNs), and streaming technologies to ensure fast and reliable delivery of multimedia content across various devices and platforms. Multimedia Distribution services play a crucial role in enabling widespread access to multimedia content, supporting entertainment, education, communication, and other domains.
Source: International Telecommunication Union (ITU)
LOST view: TVA-Functional Architecture Principles
Identifier: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/egovera/MultimediaDistributionApplicationService
ABB name: egovera:MultimediaDistributionApplicationService
EIRA concept: eira:ArchitectureBuildingBlock
Last modification: 2023-11-20
Identifier: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/egovera/MultimediaDistributionApplicationService
Interoperability Layer: TechnicalApplication
Specialises: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/DataManagementApplicationService

properties.value: Multimedia Distribution refers to a data management application service that facilitates the efficient and scalable distribution of multimedia content, such as audio, video, images, and other multimedia formats. It encompasses the storage, retrieval, and delivery of multimedia assets to end-users or target systems. This service typically involves the use of network infrastructure, content delivery networks (CDNs), and streaming technologies to ensure fast and reliable delivery of multimedia content across various devices and platforms. Multimedia Distribution services play a crucial role in enabling widespread access to multimedia content, supporting entertainment, education, communication, and other domains.
TVI-Data Management and Knowledge Discovery Infrastructure Enablers [Motivation]
